name: KOPIN CORP
summary: Kopin Corporation (KOPN) develops and manufactures display and optical technologies, including wearable computing systems. The company produces high-resolution microdisplays, optical systems, and related components used in defense, enterprise, and consumer applications. Kopin's products include tiny display systems for head-mounted displays and augmented/virtual reality devices, serving military, industrial, and commercial markets.
